evals.prompt: Review PR 2075 for the extension listing
evals.expected_output: Structured review of gbt9704 extension with APPROVE verdict. Should check duplicate, repo, README, license, category, quality, and security. Repo is public, MIT licensed, has README, correct category (custom-formats.yml).

assertions.description: Output contains APPROVE, REQUEST_CHANGES, or INVESTIGATE verdict
Verdict is APPROVE (repo is clean, MIT, has README, correct category)

evals.prompt: Review PR 2074 for the extension listing
evals.expected_output: Structured review of shortiquiz and stepbystep extensions. Two entries from same author. Should check both, run security scan on each, return per-entry verdicts. PR verdict is the worst across both entries.

assertions.description: Output mentions both shortiquiz and stepbystep
Security check appears for both entries
License checked for at least one entry
